assertions.expectation: Recommends upgrading the control plane first before any node pools
assertions.reason: Phase 1 explicitly upgrades control plane first with gcloud container clusters upgrade --master command before proceeding to node pools

assertions.expectation: Provides a specific node pool upgrade order with rationale (coordinating→data→master, or similar logical sequence)
assertions.reason: Clearly specifies upgrade order as 'Coordinating → Data → Masters (least critical to most critical)' with explicit rationale for each step

assertions.expectation: Addresses PV safety: regional pd-ssd volumes can reattach to nodes in other zones, which is good for upgrades
assertions.reason: Explicitly states 'Regional PD-SSD volumes will reattach to new nodes automatically' and lists this as a key safety feature

assertions.expectation: Recommends setting PDB for Elasticsearch master nodes to ensure quorum (minAvailable=2 for 3-master setup)
assertions.reason: Provides complete PDB YAML configuration for master nodes with minAvailable: 2 and explains it 'Allows 1 master to drain while 2 maintain quorum'

assertions.expectation: Recommends maxSurge=1, maxUnavailable=0 for all ES node pools (conservative, data-safe)
assertions.reason: Shows gcloud commands setting --max-surge-upgrade 1 --max-unavailable-upgrade 0 for all three node pools with rationale of conservative settings

assertions.expectation: Advises verifying Elasticsearch cluster health (green status) between each node pool upgrade
assertions.reason: Includes curl commands to check cluster health after each node pool upgrade and monitoring commands throughout the process

assertions.expectation: Mentions checking PV reclaim policy is set to Retain (not Delete) as a safety measure
assertions.reason: Pre-upgrade checklist includes specific kubectl command to 'Check PV reclaim policy (should be Retain)' as a safety verification

assertions.expectation: Includes kubectl commands for checking StatefulSet rollout status
assertions.reason: Provides kubectl commands like 'kubectl get statefulset elasticsearch-data' and monitoring commands with 'kubectl get pods' for StatefulSet status

assertions.expectation: Recommends taking an Elasticsearch snapshot backup before starting
assertions.reason: Pre-upgrade checklist includes detailed curl command for taking cluster snapshot backup with specific naming convention
